# _dart_sdk_archive_license_md

This bundle is part of the the Flutter SDK.

The source code is hosted at [flutter/engine/build/archives](https://github.com/flutter/engine/tree/42d3d75a56efe1a2e9902f52dc8006099c45d937/build/archives).
